title: Get a copy of a domestic abuse conviction
body: "To get a copy of the conviction, you should:   fill in the relevant sample letter as best you can send it to the court that handed out the sentence    It usually costs £5 for a copy but you may be able to get help with the fee.  If you don’t know the name of the court, ask the police officer who handled the investigation.  You can use the copy of the conviction as evidence if you’re applying for legal aid to divorce or separate from an abusive partner.  The conviction must be on this list of offences. "
